_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for toolgate — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk's manifesto declares. The LLM outputs ONLY these fields.
record_store: <absolute dir for outputs + run-ledger — the cargo workspace root under exod>

vars.CMD: <perk=run: the command line to run — the floor sees it before bash does>
vars.WORKDIR: <perk=run: cwd for the command; MUST resolve inside the cargo workspace; defaults to record_store>
vars.OUT: <perk=run: capture path for stdout+stderr; defaults to record_store/exec.out>
vars.TOOL: <claim perks: the claimed tool NAME (never values)>
vars.ARGS_DIGEST: <claim perks: sha256 of the canonical args JSON>
vars.TARGET: <claim perks: coarse class label — path:<root> / host:<name> / shell / net>
